banner: Did you know Spotlight PA is a nonprofit? Learn more about our work »
featured-promo-image-description: Support Spotlight PA's nonpartisan journalism and your gift will be DOUBLED.
sticky-image-description: Support Spotlight PA's independent, unbiased reporting for Pennsylvania and today, your gift will be DOUBLED.
support-hed: Before you go, we need your help...
support-text: We grant elected officials extraordinary power when we give them our vote, which means we must demand extraordinary accountability once they are in office. But that's impossible if "We the People" don't have information about what decisions they're making and how they spend our money. That's why Spotlight PA exists, but we can't keep digging without your support — and for a limited time, your tax-deductible gift will be DOUBLED. We're independent, we live here, and we don't answer to shareholders or a big corporation. We're unbiased in this polarized time, with no political agenda or opinion pieces. And we're a nonprofit, which means we prioritize in-depth investigative and public-service reporting that puts you first. Uncertain times call for decisive action. More than 11,000 readers just like you — friends and neighbors in your community who still give a damn about truth, accountability, and transparency — are standing behind the free and fearless reporting Spotlight PA provides. Today, your gift of any amount will be DOUBLED by a generous donor as part of our Spring Member Drive. Thank you for your commitment! — Christopher Baxter, CEO/President PS: If you prefer to mail a check, you can send it to: Spotlight PA, PO Box 11728, Harrisburg, PA 17108-1728
takeover-dek: Support Spotlight PA before midnight tonight and get your gift DOUBLED. Don't miss this match — hurry a gift now »
